articles.title: Mortgage brokers ask FHFA for 12-month delay of Fannie, Freddie condo rules
articles.summary: The National Association of Mortgage Brokers (NAMB) is asking the Federal Housing Finance Agency (FHFA) to delay new Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac condominium project and property insurance standards.

articles.title: Single women gain ground in affordable housing markets
articles.summary: A 2025 HMDA analysis finds single women under 45 made 17.4% of New Orleans purchase loans vs 6.5% in San Jose and 11.4% nationally.

articles.title: Build Housing Affordably Act introduced in House
articles.summary: The measure would temporarily suspend the application of Build America, Buy America requirements for certain affordable housing projects.

articles.title: Sagent names Kenneth Posner chief financial officer
articles.summary: Sagent hired Kenneth Posner, a former Mr. Cooper strategy leader, as CFO as it scales its Dara mortgage servicing platform.

articles.title: AceableAgent, Tom Ferry launch Fast Track training for new real estate agents
articles.summary: AceableAgent and Tom Ferry launched Fast Track, a 25 video course with 11 chapters, plus scripts and business planning tools.

articles.title: The new oil? Inside the effort to turn AI computing power into a tradeable commodity
articles.summary: AI compute futures could eventually rival some of the world's largest commodity markets, Silicon Data's Carmen Li believes.

articles.title: The private listings opt-out: impediment or enablement?
articles.summary: States adopt three private listings models, mandate public marketing, opt out warnings in statute or agency written forms.

articles.title: Hometap updates HEI pricing with two-tier multiplier
articles.summary: Hometap launches two-tier HEI pricing with 1.65x and 1.80x multipliers plus an 18.5% compounded monthly cost cap.

articles.title: SpaceX IPO leaves retail investors with too few shares and a tough hold-or-sell decision
articles.summary: Those who did receive stock are taking different approaches, with some selling into the company's market debut while others holding for the long haul.

articles.title: The next DFW boom may be south, not north, here is the roadmap
articles.summary: For more than half a century, growth in Dallas-Fort Worth has largely moved in one direction: north. Each generation of expansion pushed the metropolitan frontier. Oak Cliff gave way to White Rock, which gave way to High…

articles.title: People in China are watching the World Cup differently this time
articles.summary: A 12-hour-plus time difference and various streaming options are influencing how people in China watch the World Cup.

articles.title: CFTC chair Selig defends decision to approve ‘perps’ in U.S.
articles.summary: Michael Selig said that incumbents will always fear the future, but it's important to develop the new asset class domestically rather than only offshore.

articles.title: Ron Baron bought $1 billion of SpaceX shares in IPO, lifting stake to $25 billion
articles.summary: "I think we're gonna make hundreds of billions of dollars," Baron said Monday on CNBC's "Squawk Box."

articles.title: SpaceX doesn't have a timeline for its human missions to Mars. Kalshi traders say don't expect it this decade
articles.summary: Traders on prediction market platform Kalshi see only an 18% chance the Elon Musk-led company gets to Earth's neighbor by 2030.

articles.title: Charlie Javice reportedly seeking a pardon from Trump
articles.summary: Javice founded a startup called Frank that JPMorgan acquired in 2021 for $175 million.

articles.title: Why TD Securities anticipates even bigger days ahead for SpaceX
articles.summary: Peter Haynes, TD Securities' head of index and market structure, suggests SpaceX's public debut is only a small part of the larger SpaceX timeline.

articles.title: New SpaceX millionaires are reinventing the business of managing large wealth
articles.summary: Wealth advisors say SpaceXers have unique ways of addressing their financial challenges, including whiteboarding, troubleshooting and AI.

articles.title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX begins trading on the Nasdaq
articles.summary: Elon Musk's stake in SpaceX is worth more than $766 billion. Combined with his Tesla holdings, Musk's net worth as of Friday is roughly $1.05 trillion.

articles.title: The S&P 500 already made a big call on SpaceX stock and index fund investors need to know it
articles.summary: The S&P 500 index, where trillions in retirement savings are invested, said no to the SpaceX IPO, the biggest in history. Here's what that means for portfolios.

articles.title: SpaceX cuts retail IPO allocation to low 20% range, source says
articles.summary: The Elon Musk-led company plans to direct a percentage in the low 20s of the offering to retail buyers, according to a person familiar with the matter.

articles.title: From startup to $1.8 trillion: The investors who took a chance on SpaceX now reap the rewards
articles.summary: With SpaceX seeking an IPO valuation of nearly $1.8 trillion, early bets are poised to generate some of the biggest paper gains in venture capital history.

articles.title: SpaceX raising $75 billion in record-setting IPO as Nasdaq debut awaits
articles.summary: SpaceX is selling 555.6 shares at $135 a piece, raising $75 billion in the largest IPO on record.

articles.title: Luxury stocks spike on proposed U.S.-Iran peace deal; LVMH up 5%
articles.summary: Luxury stocks have been hard hit by the Iran war, as the Middle East had been a fast-growing market for the otherwise largely muted sector.

articles.title: SpaceX to close above $2 trillion market cap on its debut, prediction market traders say
articles.summary: Traders on Polymarket think it's likely SpaceX will join a group of just six companies with a market value beyond $2 trillion.

articles.title: Gold slumps to 6-month low even as inflation fears rise. Here's why bullion is out of favor
articles.summary: The yellow metal is at its lowest level of the year as potential interest rate increases and faltering technical signals weigh on prices.

articles.title: Citigroup shares outperform down market after Trump endorsement
articles.summary: Jane Fraser-led Citi fell 1%, less than the rest of the market and some other major banks, after Trump lauded its turnaround in a social media post.

articles.title: KKR says AI productivity boom to keep on going — but warns of 'extreme' trend not seen since the 19th century
articles.summary: KKR said in its mid-year outlook Thursday that AI will drive economic growth for years to come, but only in specific sectors.

articles.title: North Carolina treasurer passes on SpaceX citing valuation concerns; favors OpenAI, Anthropic
articles.summary: North Carolina has invested heavily in AI startups OpenAI and Anthropic while avoiding a direct stake in SpaceX.

articles.title: Kalshi trading in 'perps' crosses $1 billion in volume within a week of launch

articles.title: Beijing escalating AI espionage to catch up with the U.S. on tech, cybersecurity firm says
articles.summary: U.S. cybersecurity giant CrowdStrike said China-based entities made over half of state-sponsored cyberattacks on tech firms for artificial intelligence assets.

articles.title: Federal Reserve Board announces that results from its annual bank stress test will be released on Wednesday, June 24, at 4 p.m. EDT.

articles.title: JPMorgan Chase plans to deploy more powerful AI agents this year
articles.summary: JPMorgan Chase's move suggests long-running AI agents are close to clearing the security and governance hurdles that have slowed adoption inside big companies.

articles.title: SpaceX employee group creates low-fee wealth management option with Choreo for post-IPO
articles.summary: The deal marks a bold experiment in the wealth management industry that could shift the balance of power from advisory firms to wealthy groups of investors.

articles.title: Electric vehicle giant BYD predicts 80% of China car sales will soon be electric
articles.summary: BYD expects China's competitive electric vehicle market to continue growing, even as manufacturers and analysts anticipate domestic demand to taper further.

articles.title: Bitcoin is cratering, but a new Wall Street crypto hype is on the rise
articles.summary: As bitcoin dropped to its lowest price since 2024, investors flock to a new type of crypto investment linked to the hyperliquid platforms, HYPE ETFs.

articles.title: This startup wants to reduce payment friction on prediction markets
articles.summary: EDGE Markets is announcing two new products to solve payment issues in prediction markets, the company shared exclusively with CNBC.

articles.title: Hong Kong's IPO boom is developing a performance problem
articles.summary: As Hong Kong vies with Wall Street to be the top IPO market, a growing number of pre-debut runups turn sour after their listing.
